title: フューチャー☆ロケハン

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: While I'm out with Smart Falcon...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. Seeing how we still have some time
before we have to get back...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
There's something I want to do with you. Is that
okay?
choice_data_list: What do you want to do?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: In a word—location scouting!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
When people watch a music video from a top
Umadol, not only do they expect excellent
cinematography and editing...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
They also won't be satisfied unless I film in a
location that fully highlights my charms!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
If I wanna release cute music videos like that
someday, I've gotta start learning right now!
choice_data_list: I see! Sure then, why not!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! I knew you'd say yes! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right! Since I've got you here, I wanna
know what you think! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
What's the perfect location to showcase my
cuteness?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: An aquarium! Now that just screams "cute"!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: We could call it... "Aquatic ☆ Love." Perfect! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: All right! ☆ Since we've decided, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So Smart Falcon and I head straight to the local
aquarium...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wow! Look at all the pretty little fish! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Look at this one, Trainer! Its fins look just like a
frilly skirt!
choice_data_list: It's kind of like an Umadol outfit.
It's kind of like an Umadol outfit.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Ah! That's what I was just thinking!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Great minds think alike, huh, Trainer? ♪
choice_data_list: I guess you're rubbing off on me.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Maybe!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But we've still got a ways to go! I'm going to keep
on taking center stage...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And I'm definitely going to fulfill my dream of
becoming the cutest top Umadol!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'm counting on you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, that's one more reason why we need to
find the perfect location.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'll leave you in charge of taking reference pics! ☆
But watch out for the tanks where cameras aren't
allowed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, we continue scouting for good
locations at the aquarium until Smart Falcon is
satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: A movie theater! That'll be a new one for me!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
"Cinematic ☆ Love"... Yeah! That's the perfect
song name! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: All right! ☆ If we're decided, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So Smart Falcon and I head over to a local movie
theater.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Okay! First, we need to see what's playing!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
The vibe of a theater totally changes depending
on what kind of people are there—families,
groups of friends, couples... ☆
choice_data_list: You've given this a lot of thought!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Of course! The secret to location scouting is in
the power of observation!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh, Idol ☆ Glitter Saga is playing! I didn't know it was already out!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's about an idol sister duo chosen by the stars,
and their path to the super stage...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Really?! C-can we?
choice_data_list: Might as well, since we're here.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wow! Thanks, Trainer! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Let's finish location scouting first, and then we
can enjoy the rest of the day together! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After enjoying both the scouting and the movie, I
head back to campus with a very pleased Smart
Falcon.
